calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2023 Off Calendar

Request To Set Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Lydia M Villarreal; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:52 p.m. and concluding at 2:16 p.m.

Plaintiff Karen Lum is present represented by Keith Velleca, Esq. placed under oath and testifies via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Shatara Architecture Inc. not appearing

Plaintiff's counsel gives a statment of facts and examins Karen Lum.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Progressive Foundation, and against Defendant Chet Peeples, Chet W. Peeples, aka Chester Peeples, as follows:

1. Damages: $25,000.00
2. Prejudgment Interest: $2,623.28
3. Costs: $858.50

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $28,481.78

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2023 Continued To Nov-07-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
